name: Mondstadt — City of Wind and Idylls
description:
The nation of Mondstadt from Genshin Impact.

Update 6: Dornman Port & minor fixes. Lohen soon!

The characters are written from my memory, so let me know if I made any mistakes! :3

If the AI says something wrong, swipe or edit for a better response. Character portrayal inaccuracies are also out of my control beyond the definitions!

Characters present: Amber, Lisa, Jean, Kaeya, Diluc, Venti, Barbara, Rosaria, Fischl, Eula, Bennett, Razor, Mona, Albedo, Sucrose, Mika, Dahlia, Boreas, Dvalin, Durin, Varka.

Characters to be added[?]: Lohen, Dainsleif, Xiangling, Timaeus, Wagner, Charles, Cyrus, Marjorie... (Traveler?)
creator: Ferrok
